evals.prompt: A normal coding-agent workflow request in an existing repo.
evals.expected_output: Uses the STS feature namespace, follows the skill process, and records required evidence.
assertions: Does not claim completion without evidence

evals.prompt: A multi-concern coding-agent request involving parallel work, risk, or UI/UX where applicable.
evals.expected_output: Identifies risks and routes to adjacent STS skills only when appropriate.
assertions: Names adjacent skills only when needed

evals.prompt: A near-miss request that should not over-trigger coding-agent.
evals.expected_output: Explains why another STS skill or no STS skill is more appropriate.
assertions: Does not perform unrelated tool-wrapper behavior
